ranked_hypotheses.title: TST Affinity-Based Dissolution Model for Amorphous Solid Dispersions
ranked_hypotheses.evolution_direction: Resolve which ASD dissolution regime is surface-reaction-limited; specify rate-limiting molecular event (drug-surface vs. polymer-water interface)

ranked_hypotheses.title: Passivation Layer Kinetics Unify Glass Alteration Rinds and ASD Polymer-Rich Surface Layers
ranked_hypotheses.evolution_direction: Deepen mechanism beyond generic sqrt(t); identify specific diffusing species; add termination term for polymer layer transience vs. permanent glass rind

ranked_hypotheses.title: Saturation Index-Guided Crystallization Risk Assessment for Supersaturated Drug Solutions
ranked_hypotheses.evolution_direction: Differentiate from MFAD 2019; specify what geochemical SI adds — multi-ion activity products, pH-coupled equilibria, or kinetic SI trajectory not in scalar S

ranked_hypotheses.title: Composition-Dissolution Rate Functions Enable Predictive ASD Formulation Screening
ranked_hypotheses.evolution_direction: Excluded: dimensionality problem (drug structural space >> silicate oxide space) has no evolutionary solution that doesn't already exist as standard QSPR

diversity_check.adjustments: No adjustments needed. Only 1/4 pairs share conceptual bridge. Three distinct clusters represented: kinetic/TST (H1.1, H1.4), structural/diffusion (H1.2), thermodynamic (H1.6). H1.4 excluded from evolution on merit, not diversity grounds.

elo_sanity.notes: Perfect agreement. Elo cleanly separated H1.6 from H1.4 (0.1 composite point gap) via testability and evolutionary potential vs. dimensionality barrier — validating the linear ranking in its most uncertain region.

score_metadata.cross_field_note: All hypotheses share identical cross_field_distance=7 — inherent to single-session geochemistry→pharma axis; dimension does not differentiate within this session
